# openwrt_network_route (Data Source)

Manages a static IPv4 route.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Name of the section. This name is only used when interacting with UCI directly.

### Read-Only

- `disabled` (Boolean) Disable this route without removing it.
- `gateway` (String) Next hop IP address for this route.
- `interface` (String) Logical network interface this route is associated with.
- `metric` (Number) Route metric (priority). Lower values are preferred.
- `mtu` (Number) MTU for this route.
- `netmask` (String) Subnet mask for the target network (e.g. "255.255.255.0").
- `onlink` (Boolean) Treat the gateway as directly reachable on this link even if it does not match any interface prefix.
- `source` (String) Preferred source address when sending to this destination.
- `table` (String) Routing table to add this route to (e.g. "main", "local", or a numeric table ID).
- `target` (String) Destination network or host address (e.g. "192.168.2.0").
